title: USD/JPY
text: USD/JPY trading at 158.7, approaching the 160.00 level that has previously triggered BoJ verbal warnings; intervention risk rises on a sustained break above 160.

title: AUD/USD
text: AUD/USD long% at 10% with retail traders 90% short, diverging from CFTC Leveraged Fund net long position; watch for potential squeeze.

title: EUR/USD
text: Fed-ECB 175bp differential weighs on EUR/USD, with ECB officials leaning toward an April rate hold; pair holds at 1.1815.

title: Risk Regime
text: VIX at 18.2 signals normal volatility, with S&P 500 up 0.80% and MOVE Index down 8.62%; risk-on environment favoured.

title: Cross-Asset Correlation Breaks
text: USD/JPY vs VIX correlation breaks at +1.58σ, indicating JPY no longer acting as safe haven; watch for regime shift implications.
